  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

Testing Packages for Coverage Data

library(nflreadr)
library(nflfastR)
library(tidyverse)
# Load FTN charting data
ftn_data <- load_ftn_charting(seasons = 2025)
# Check what columns it has
names(ftn_data)
 [1] "ftn_game_id"            "nflverse_game_id"       "season"                
 [4] "week"                   "ftn_play_id"            "nflverse_play_id"      
 [7] "starting_hash"          "qb_location"            "n_offense_backfield"   
[10] "n_defense_box"          "is_no_huddle"           "is_motion"             
[13] "is_play_action"         "is_screen_pass"         "is_rpo"                
[16] "is_trick_play"          "is_qb_out_of_pocket"    "is_interception_worthy"
[19] "is_throw_away"          "read_thrown"            "is_catchable_ball"     
[22] "is_contested_ball"      "is_created_reception"   "is_drop"               
[25] "is_qb_sneak"            "n_blitzers"             "n_pass_rushers"        
[28] "is_qb_fault_sack"       "date_pulled"           
# Look at the data dictionary
?dictionary_ftn_charting
# OR
View(nflreadr::dictionary_ftn_charting)
# Filter for your game
ftn_rams_seahawks <- ftn_data %>%
  filter(week == 11, ftn_game_id == 6893)

head(ftn_rams_seahawks)

# Want to join nflverse_play_id here to play_id in the game_data dataframe
participation_data <- load_participation(seasons = 2025)
#View(nflreadr::dictionary_participation)
# DO THIS FOR WHEN THE 2025 SEASON WRAPS AFTER THE SUPER BOWL

# Try loading 2025 to see the structure
participation_2025 <- load_participation(seasons = 2025)

# See if 2024 has data
nrow(participation_2025)
[1] 45184
# If it has data, see the columns
names(participation_2025)
 [1] "nflverse_game_id"       "old_game_id"            "play_id"               
 [4] "possession_team"        "offense_formation"      "offense_personnel"     
 [7] "defenders_in_box"       "defense_personnel"      "number_of_pass_rushers"
[10] "players_on_play"        "offense_players"        "defense_players"       
[13] "n_offense"              "n_defense"              "ngs_air_yards"         
[16] "time_to_throw"          "was_pressure"           "route"                 
[19] "defense_man_zone_type"  "defense_coverage_type"  "offense_names"         
[22] "defense_names"          "offense_positions"      "defense_positions"     
[25] "offense_numbers"        "defense_numbers"       
# Check what weeks are available
participation_2025 %>%
  distinct(nflverse_game_id) %>%
  arrange(nflverse_game_id)
participation_2025 %>%
  arrange(nflverse_game_id) %>% 
  filter(nflverse_game_id == '2025_11_SEA_LA')
game_data_extra_context <- full_join(
  game_data,
  ftn_rams_seahawks,
  by = c("play_id" = "nflverse_play_id")
)


game_data_extra_context <- left_join(
  game_data_extra_context,
  participation_2025,
  by = c("game_id" = "nflverse_game_id",
         "play_id" = "play_id")
)


head(game_data_extra_context)
View(nflreadr::dictionary_pbp)
View(nflreadr::dictionary_participation)
# Strip the nflverse class attributes
interception_analysis <- game_data_extra_context %>%
  as_tibble() %>%  # Convert to regular tibble
  filter(interception == 1) %>%
  select(
    qtr, desc,
    defense_coverage_type,
    defense_man_zone_type,
    was_pressure,
    read_thrown,
    n_blitzers,
    is_qb_out_of_pocket,
    is_interception_worthy
  )

interception_analysis
turnovers_test <- game_data_extra_context %>%
  as_tibble() %>%  # Add this to avoid the print error
  filter(interception == 1 | fumble_lost == 1) %>%
  select(
    qtr, time, down, ydstogo, yardline_100, 
    desc, posteam, defteam,
    interception, fumble_lost,
    ep, epa, wp, wpa, 
    is_interception_worthy, 
    n_defense_box, n_blitzers, n_pass_rushers,
    # ADD THESE - the coverage columns we've been waiting for!
    defense_coverage_type,
    defense_man_zone_type,
    was_pressure,
    read_thrown,
    is_qb_out_of_pocket
  ) %>%
  arrange(qtr, desc(time))

turnovers_test
cat("Number of turnovers:", nrow(turnovers_test), "\n")
Number of turnovers: 5

Turnovers when rarely blitzed -> look at rush success rate? Look at the avg number of players in the box, blitzers, pass rushers the Rams Defence used
